A

addAlbum(Album) - Method in class view.AlbumList
Adds an album to the collection.
addPhoto(Photo) - Method in class view.Album
Adds a photo to the album.
addTag(String, String) - Method in class view.Photo
Adds a tag to this photo.
addUser(String) - Method in class view.UserList
Adds a user to the list.

Controller for the admin management screen.

Album - Class in view
Model class representing an album containing photos.
Album(String) - Constructor for class view.Album
Constructs an Album with a given name.
AlbumController - Class in view
Controller for the user's album list screen.
AlbumController() - Constructor for class view.AlbumController
 
albumExists(String) - Method in class view.AlbumList
Checks if an album with the given name exists (case-insensitive).
AlbumList - Class in view
Model class representing a collection of albums for a user.
AlbumList() - Constructor for class view.AlbumList
Constructs an AlbumList with no albums.
AlbumListHelper - Class in view
Utility class for saving and loading AlbumList objects to and from disk.

G

getAlbums() - Method in class view.AlbumList
Returns the list of albums.
getDate() - Method in class view.Photo
Returns the date and time the photo was taken.
getDescription() - Method in class view.Photo
Returns the description (caption) of the photo.
getFilePath() - Method in class view.Photo
Returns the file path of the photo.
getName() - Method in class view.Album
Returns the name of the album.
getName() - Method in class view.Tag
Returns the tag name.
getPhotos() - Method in class view.Album
Returns the list of photos in the album.
getTags() - Method in class view.Photo
Returns the list of tags associated with the photo.
getUsers() - Method in class view.UserList
Returns the list of usernames.
getValue() - Method in class view.Tag
Returns the tag value.

save(String, AlbumList) - Static method in class view.AlbumListHelper
Saves the given AlbumList for the specified user to disk.

Saves the given UserList to disk.

Sets the description (caption) of the photo.
setName(String) - Method in class view.Album

Starts the album list view for a given user by loading that user's albums from storage.
start(Stage) - Method in class view.Photos
 
start(Album, int) - Method in class view.PhotoViewController
Initializes the photo viewer for a given album and photo index.
start(Album, String, AlbumList) - Method in class view.PhotoController
Starts the photo view for a given album and user.
stop() - Method in class view.Photos
